title: Won't find what you're searching for if you don't know what it is — 2020 NYE seed
html:
Won't find what you're searching for if you don't know what it is — 2020 NYE seed

Source: 2020-01-02 Apple Note. Two days into the new year, HS senior. One epistemic maxim followed by a 7-item to-do.

TL;DR

  • "You won't find what you are searching for if you don't know what it is" — proto-version of the asking the right question concept; the failure-mode is not knowing what to look for before you start looking.
  • Reddit FBLA + Chinese recording + Kim's eyebrows + wrestling stuff ready — captures the FBLA state-prep grind era + appearance/wrestling micro-rituals of HS senior life in Grants Pass.
  • 2020-01 sits 2 months before the COVID watchlist — last "normal" pre-pandemic mind-state captured.
  • The maxim aligns with later Ahmad Jamal stream line: "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have." Same lineage, 2 years apart.
  • Three-line note + chore list = the canonical Yahir HS-era format: maxim + execution.

Connections

  • asking the right question
  • fbla
  • grants pass teen era
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream
